risk_description: Shared AWS admin account without MFA enables full environment compromise
Excessive IAM permissions (no least privilege) allow lateral movement to ePHI
No SIEM or log review means breaches go undetected
IR plan never tested; HIPAA breach-notification clock missed
No endpoint detection (EDR) on employee laptops
No annual security awareness training; phishing-susceptible workforce
Vendors onboarded with no security review (supply chain risk)
Backups exist but restore never tested; recovery may fail
No formal software inventory; unpatched/unknown assets
No risk appetite statement; inconsistent risk decisions
